Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mildly elevated ALT, indicating possible liver involvement. LDL cholesterol is slightly high, increasing cardiovascular risk, while HDL is also elevated, which is generally protective. Globulin is markedly low, which may reflect immunodeficiency or protein loss. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal and liver function, and assessment for causes of low globulin.
